Green Dragon Scales  
 

Quest Item
WT: 2.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Green Dragon Scales
Quest Item
WT: 2.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Type:Misc
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:25 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:25
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-19 03:31:25
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 20,000pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Very Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Dragon Scale Conversion

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

The Emerald Jungle
NPC Name
Severilous

Veeshan's Peak 1.0
NPC Name
Hoshkar

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

East Freeport
Quest Name
Warrior Epic: Jagged Blade of War

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name

Veeshan's Peak 1.0

# Jun 03 2013 at 9:41 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1600042700503
Scholar
37 posts
I found Severilous at 8:15 PM Pacific Time on June 3rd 2013 up in the northwest corner above the cliff of course. Dropped all sorts o' stuff but no green dragon scales. Was lookin for the scales for a warrior friend. It did drop "torn,book" gig for Fiery Avenger..Paladin epic 1.0 I believe? I shot a tell out to /general chat...got several tells about the green scales askin to buy em..and one person said gonna try and run over with their younger paladin..lotsa fun

# Jan 22 2006 at 12:48 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592262625253
View User Forum
35 posts
oh wow...so you are getting a really powerful weapon without actualy earning it. boy aint you special. no wonder newbies have no respect anymore. with people buying their epics why should newbies respect anything or anyone? ya know its called a quest for a reason. your supposed to work on it yourself. just wish SOE would make ALL epic drops no trade. then all you people out to buy your epics would be really screwed. though me and my friends wouldnt have a problem. we are doing our epics the way they are ment to be done ;)
▲ Page top
RE: Thank you Sony
QuoteReply
# Feb 18 2006 at 5:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763862510
9 posts
Hmmm what about the epics that are easier then others to "earn"? Rogue and Monk Epics for example is the easiest to "earn", where the SK, Warrior, Necro Epics are much harder to "earn". Class balance has been an issue since day 1 of EQ. Epic balance is the same way. So until the class/epics are balanced out, why don't you STFU about finding a way to "buy" a step in a tough epic where the dragons are either Permacamped by People for profit, or in an elemntal lvl zone.

I'm a lvl 70 warrior who never got epic 1.0 because the green scales were either 100k to BUY and/or could never get a raid to Severilous before the manaburn wizzie team got there.

So before you cry like a baby because SOE made a peice of a epic no drop, just think about balance for a bit..... or are you one of the manaburn wizzies who got all pissed that the color change quest came out because there went one of you cash crop items?

Huulk 10 Warrior

talk about cry like a baby.....no one should have to "buy" any step in there epic because the mobs should not be camped for greed....try getting the drop from fear....all becuase peeps wanna be stupid and pay 100k-200k just to look like a skellie...i don't care what so called benifits you get from being a skeleton your greed is stopping someone from getting their epic

verrell cogswin
QuoteReply
# Nov 08 2003 at 12:52 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592761143204
10 posts
Verrell Cogswin where is this guy who can convert red dragon scales to green dragon scales?? new npc patch nov 5,2003

location?
zone?
anyone have info on this guy im guessing he is a gnome?
tracked pot,pok,bb,shadowhaven, ec,lavastorm,efreeport,noluckyet
any info would help on where he is?
stillsearching
▲ Page top
RE: verrell cogswin
QuoteReply
# Nov 08 2003 at 11:36 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254458092
7 posts
He is in N. Ro. Follow the water heading out from freeport east. As you get closer to the oasis zone, you will see a post or tower on your right. It is not the one right next to the zone for those of you who are familiar, but close to there.

When you hail him he asks for water. I gave him some and he goes on to talk about changing stuff diff colors. When you give him your red scale like he asks, he gives you back(after a couple more dialog prompts... something like "what good news" and "what bad news") a box and a quest. You have to go all over and collect stuff for some glue as he busted your damn scale.. lol... I assume you get the green scale after quest is done... I have not finished it yet. BTW, if anyone finds Deep Fungus Mold please post it here. Is the only part I have not figured out yet. He says to buy it. Maybe one of his many brothers is a merchant? I will post more when I know.

Posted in both Red and Green Dragon scale item info.

Michael aka Tazreen Fantasy of Vazelle
Warrior of the 62nd season
▲ Page top
RE: deep fungus mold
QuoteReply
# Dec 11 2003 at 7:48 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1694996217190
Sage
156 posts
i found some for sale from heidi grainsifter in south qeynos in voleen's bakery, it appears to be in regular stock.

▲ Page top
RE: verrell cogswin
QuoteReply
# Nov 08 2003 at 1:44 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248229586
2 posts
He is a gnome located in NRO at the Scarab pillar following the shore line on the way to the Oasis. Simply hail him...give him some water and he tells you about changing the color from red to green.
You have to be a warrior for him to talk to you, otherwise he tells you to take a hike.

Callak Kellrass
51st Warrior of Rallos Zek
Order of Retribution Officer
E`CI

▲ Page top
warrior epic fix
QuoteReply
# Jun 10 2003 at 8:19 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591778661673
3 posts
I really believe that Severilous should be a spawned mob, like the cleric epic dragon Ragefire. I have been working on the warrior epic for well over a year now, and am held up by the green dragon scale. Even if Severilous were a spawned mob, the warrior epic would still be more difficult that most of the other epics. Another reason for wanting this is that on my server there are a few who will farm the old world dragons, and then ask 85k for the green dragon scale. This is not right. Please send feedback to Sony to change this. They changed Ragefire spawn, and I think the same should happen to severilous. Maybe if enough warriors, upset over people farming Severilous, send feedback then maybe just maybe Sony will listen to us. I really don't think it is fair that people who have worked so long and hard for their epics should never get it because the uber guilds on the server take him out for platinum. It would be nice if all people had 85k to spare, but those of us in lower end guilds can never get the right force there before he is slaughtered. Just my two cents of frustration, hehe.
▲ Page top
RE: warrior epic fix
QuoteReply
# Nov 21 2004 at 1:57 PM Rating: Decent
Gilliadson
Scholar
82 posts
I'm not sure of the current pricing on other servers but on Tunare the scales are currently around 30K in bazaar when you can find them... The Red ones usually around 8K and the White ones just recently dropped from 30K to 15K. I too think that this gouging is bull. On Tunare we have a group that Regularly raids Vox and Naggy, the scales from them are awarded on a seniority basis and the raids are open for any who want to attend 42-52. I wish we could get something like that going for Severilous as well.

Edited, Thu Aug 25 00:38:16 2005
____________________________

He's lying. Severilous and Hoshkar are the ONLY mobs that drop the green scale. Wuoshi isn't even apart of Kunark. ALL of the epics take place in lands pre-Velious.

And no the scale keeper doesn't drop the white or green scale either. That happened only on test for a short time. Never went live.
